title: It's getting harder to focus every day
excerpt: I’m feeling it right now. I had to set a timer for 15 minute on my computer and block all distractions to write this. If I didn’t force myself to focus I would easily get distracted by something after few minutes. Even when I’m doing things that I’ve been waiting to do it, I still feel the urge to do something else. I don’t know how and when this happened. During the last few years I was always studying, working, and doing open source. And actually got stuff done. Doing all of those at the same time requires paying attention to what I wanted to do and ignore the noise.
content_html:
I’m feeling it right now. I had to set a timer for 15 minute on my computer and block all distractions to write this. If I didn’t force myself to focus I would easily get distracted by something after few minutes. Even when I’m doing things that I’ve been waiting to do it, I still feel the urge to do something else.

I don’t know how and when this happened. During the last few years I was always studying, working, and doing open source. And actually got stuff done. Doing all of those at the same time requires paying attention to what I wanted to do and ignore the noise.

Nowadays, I’m lucky if I get 1 hour of focused time. Just to be clear, my goal is not to work 90 hours a week or anything crazy. That is not possible for me. I just want the hour I spend programming, learning, or writing to be just one activity. But instead I spend 10 minute on something then I get distracted, and try to focus again.

Ideally, I want to be able to plan to work on something for long hours without any distraction. After that time get back online check for messages and other things.

The distractions are not one particular thing. A few examples:

  • I want to do something and I remember there’s a post related to this. I go to find it and in between I click on some links and end up reading something completely unrelated.
  • I am waiting for something then I go browse the web and I get distracted.
  • I’m working on something and I face a challenge I have to think for 10 minutes. I get up to get some water and check my phone along the way and get distracted. Sometimes I get distracted by making the bed.

It feels like my brain finds a way to do something else and avoid painful situations like boredom or hard work.

It reminds me of when I was in high school talking to a friend about how laying in bed with your phone can kill hours without you noticing it. It was circa 2015, back then attention hungry apps were less powerful but still lure a teenager’s mind for few hours. I learned that these apps should be used very carefully. At that time I made a decision to never have a charger near my bed. Back then it was mostly about my phone, because when I was on the computer I was either reading, or programming, or playing a game. Even if I wasn’t in the mood to think, I played a strategic game or chess. These activities exercise the mind and are fun. All of them were an intentional activity. I didn’t do any passive activities like browsing or chatting on my computer.

Later I discovered HackerNoon and Medium, it was the first website that I was browsing whenever I was bored behind the computer. This meant that I had a way to get out boredom easily. It used to have some high quality content. It inspired me to do some projects and learn more programming. I found channels like CSDojo there. Nowadays I don’t even open them. They are filled with slop or click bait articles, probably because of monetization incentives. Then hackernews, and YouTube and others took their place. I also found some good people and blogs along the way. I learned to keep a reading list from people I like to read when I’m on the bus.

I slowly found more activities for when I’m bored. This made it harder to focus on hard things for me. What kept me on track was that there was no way out. I had to work out some algebra problems. I kept myself to a very high bar of understanding what I do. And I did everything in LaTeX so I couldn’t copy from someone else. I was the only one typing them.

The first time I saw people not putting the effort and still get the reward for it was at work. You might wonder, aren’t people in the university constantly cheating and copying homework, and get good grades? Well yes, but when you talked with someone in that group it was clear that he is clueless about the subject. A good grade didn’t mean much to me at that time. And as a student cheating does not get you that far.

At work it is different. My days are mostly spend meetings and over chat. The balance between actual work and bullshit is skewed. I saw people who were barely doing any work and just talk are successful. As long as people give 10% of their attention to work they are considered fine in most environments. Previously I did an experiment to track my time and found out that I spent 8 hours chatting on slack in a week.

I don’t care how employers want to shatter employee’s focus. But this made me get used to distractions when I’m programming. I’m trying to undo this damage.

The next big change is more usage of LLMs. I find myself in this situation too many times, where I outsource something to an LLM and then I start working on something else. And while doing this I keep thinking about what it’s doing. Or when I’m thinking about something I start chatting with an LLM about my idea and instead of getting started on something I’m in research mode only for hours.

It’s good that I’m able to ask something else to research some topic for me. But the productivity only comes if I can move on to something else and not think about it. I don’t have any notifications turned on so it doesn’t distract me. But I still find myself thinking about what I just asked it to do and I cannot focus on something else.

At the same time if I’m spending the time interactively with an LLM I feel slow. I have to wait for the response and I have to correct every response coming out. The best use of AI seems to be outsourcing what they can do end to end without error.

Why do I keep doing this? Presumably because it’s easy and fast, and productive. If I realize I have to do something I can write it down to do it later or I can just ask the LLM to do it. The problem only shows up when I start doing so many things at once because it’s actually doing the thing. Then I have multiple things on my mind and can’t focus really. I have to check on it and guide it in the right direction every now and then.

And this is overstimulating, in a way that doing something without LLM sometimes is boring. You don’t see the results as fast. Which makes focusing harder.

So how can I regain my ability to focus? Sometimes I live stream what I’m doing just because with a camera I cannot escape from hard challenges by grabbing my phone. I used to co-work with my friends over discord. Unfortunately it’s not possible anymore because people in Iran cannot have a stable internet connection nowadays.

It’s incredibly hard to commit to something for a long period of time. If what I’m doing is going to take multiple days to have a result I have less motivations to do it. Meanwhile, vibe coding small utility scripts is fun I keep doing it whenever I see a friction. Whenever I am stuck I can throw my problem into it and wait strengthen this habit of waiting for an answer from someone as opposed to work through problems. And they are fast in getting back the results. So next time I have to read a paper to understand the subject I will be more reluctant because I can get a faster result through them.

I’m changing some habits to replace the current ones. If I don’t feel motivated enough to do anything I get up and pick up a book to read. I’m keeping a Garden in my balcony is that when I’m tired I can move the soil around and plant some pots and prune plants. I find this to be a less addictive than say, watching a movie. When the motivation comes back I can stop it easily.

My goal was not to find an answer for this problem. I wanted to see what’s going on and why I am not doing anything inconsequential in the past few months. Anyway the timer I set to write this really helped. I spent a lot more time to write this but it gave me the initial motivation to write.

sentences.zh: 在工作中则不同。

sentences.en: My days are mostly spend meetings and over chat.
sentences.zh: 我的大部分时间都是在开会和聊天。

sentences.en: The balance between actual work and bullshit is skewed.
sentences.zh: 实际工作和废话之间的平衡是倾斜的。

sentences.en: I saw people who were barely doing any work and just talk are successful.
sentences.zh: 我看到那些几乎不做任何工作、只是说说而已的人都取得了成功。

sentences.en: As long as people give 10% of their attention to work they are considered fine in most environments.
sentences.zh: 只要人们将 10% 的注意力投入到工作中，他们在大多数环境中就被认为是很好的。

sentences.en: Previously I did an experiment to track my time and found out that I spent 8 hours chatting on slack in a week.
sentences.zh: 之前我做了一个实验来记录我的时间，发现我一周在 Slack 上聊天的时间有 8 个小时。

blocks.html_en: I don’t care how employers want to shatter employee’s focus. But this made me get used to distractions when I’m programming. I’m trying to undo this damage.

sentences.en: I don’t care how employers want to shatter employee’s focus.
sentences.zh: 我不在乎雇主想如何分散员工的注意力。

sentences.en: But this made me get used to distractions when I’m programming.
sentences.zh: 但这让我习惯了编程时的干扰。

sentences.en: I’m trying to undo this damage.
sentences.zh: 我正在努力消除这种损害。

blocks.html_en: The next big change is more usage of LLMs. I find myself in this situation too many times, where I outsource something to an LLM and then I start working on something else. And while doing this I keep thinking about what it’s doing. Or when I’m thinking about something I start chatting with an LLM about my idea and instead of getting started on something I’m in research mode only for hours.

sentences.en: The next big change is more usage of LLMs.
sentences.zh: 下一个重大变化是更多地使用法学硕士。

sentences.en: I find myself in this situation too many times, where I outsource something to an LLM and then I start working on something else.
sentences.zh: 我发现自己多次遇到这种情况，我将一些东西外包给法学硕士，然后我开始做其他事情。

sentences.en: And while doing this I keep thinking about what it’s doing.
sentences.zh: 在这样做的同时，我一直在思考它在做什么。

sentences.en: Or when I’m thinking about something I start chatting with an LLM about my idea and instead of getting started on something I’m in research mode only for hours.
sentences.zh: 或者当我在思考某件事时，我开始与法学硕士谈论我的想法，而不是开始做某事，我只处于研究模式几个小时。

blocks.html_en: It’s good that I’m able to ask something else to research some topic for me. But the productivity only comes if I can move on to something else and not think about it. I don’t have any notifications turned on so it doesn’t distract me. But I still find myself thinking about what I just asked it to do and I cannot focus on something else.

sentences.en: It’s good that I’m able to ask something else to research some topic for me.
sentences.zh: 很高兴我能够请其他人为我研究某个主题。

sentences.en: But the productivity only comes if I can move on to something else and not think about it.
sentences.zh: 但只有当我能够不去想它而继续做其他事情时，生产力才会到来。

sentences.en: I don’t have any notifications turned on so it doesn’t distract me.
sentences.zh: 我没有打开任何通知，所以它不会分散我的注意力。

sentences.en: But I still find myself thinking about what I just asked it to do and I cannot focus on something else.
sentences.zh: 但我仍然发现自己在思考我刚刚要求它做什么，而我无法专注于其他事情。

blocks.html_en: At the same time if I’m spending the time interactively with an LLM I feel slow. I have to wait for the response and I have to correct every response coming out. The best use of AI seems to be outsourcing what they can do end to end without error.

sentences.en: At the same time if I’m spending the time interactively with an LLM I feel slow.
sentences.zh: 同时，如果我花时间与法学硕士互动，我会感觉很慢。

sentences.en: I have to wait for the response and I have to correct every response coming out.
sentences.zh: 我必须等待回复，并且必须纠正每一个回复。

sentences.en: The best use of AI seems to be outsourcing what they can do end to end without error.
sentences.zh: 人工智能的最佳用途似乎是外包他们可以端到端且无错误地完成的工作。

blocks.html_en: Why do I keep doing this? Presumably because it’s easy and fast, and productive. If I realize I have to do something I can write it down to do it later or I can just ask the LLM to do it. The problem only shows up when I start doing so many things at once because it’s actually doing the thing. Then I have multiple things on my mind and can’t focus really. I have to check on it and guide it in the right direction every now and then.

sentences.en: Why do I keep doing this?
sentences.zh: 为什么我一直这样做？

sentences.en: Presumably because it’s easy and fast, and productive.
sentences.zh: 大概是因为它简单、快速、高效。

sentences.en: If I realize I have to do something I can write it down to do it later or I can just ask the LLM to do it.
sentences.zh: 如果我意识到我必须做某事，我可以把它写下来以便稍后再做，或者我可以要求法学硕士去做。

sentences.en: The problem only shows up when I start doing so many things at once because it’s actually doing the thing.
sentences.zh: 只有当我开始同时做这么多事情时，问题才会出现，因为它实际上是在做这件事。

sentences.en: Then I have multiple things on my mind and can’t focus really.
sentences.zh: 然后我脑子里有很多事情，无法真正集中注意力。

sentences.en: I have to check on it and guide it in the right direction every now and then.
sentences.zh: 我必须时不时地检查它并引导它朝正确的方向前进。

blocks.html_en: And this is overstimulating, in a way that doing something without LLM sometimes is boring. You don’t see the results as fast. Which makes focusing harder.

sentences.en: And this is overstimulating, in a way that doing something without LLM sometimes is boring.
sentences.zh: 这太刺激了，在某种程度上，没有法学硕士做一些事情有时会很无聊。

sentences.en: You don’t see the results as fast.
sentences.zh: 您不会那么快看到结果。

sentences.en: Which makes focusing harder.
sentences.zh: 这使得对焦变得更加困难。

blocks.html_en: So how can I regain my ability to focus? Sometimes I live stream what I’m doing just because with a camera I cannot escape from hard challenges by grabbing my phone. I used to co-work with my friends over discord. Unfortunately it’s not possible anymore because people in Iran cannot have a stable internet connection nowadays.

sentences.en: So how can I regain my ability to focus?
sentences.zh: 那么我怎样才能恢复集中注意力的能力呢？

sentences.en: Sometimes I live stream what I’m doing just because with a camera I cannot escape from hard challenges by grabbing my phone.
sentences.zh: 有时我会直播我正在做的事情，因为有了相机，我无法通过抓起手机来逃避艰巨的挑战。

sentences.en: I used to co-work with my friends over discord.
sentences.zh: 我过去常常与朋友合作，因为不和。

sentences.en: Unfortunately it’s not possible anymore because people in Iran cannot have a stable internet connection nowadays.
sentences.zh: 不幸的是，这已经不可能了，因为现在伊朗人无法拥有稳定的互联网连接。

blocks.html_en: It’s incredibly hard to commit to something for a long period of time. If what I’m doing is going to take multiple days to have a result I have less motivations to do it. Meanwhile, vibe coding small utility scripts is fun I keep doing it whenever I see a friction. Whenever I am stuck I can throw my problem into it and wait strengthen this habit of waiting for an answer from someone as opposed to work through problems. And they are fast in getting back the results. So next time I have to read a paper to understand the subject I will be more reluctant because I can get a faster result through them.

sentences.en: It’s incredibly hard to commit to something for a long period of time.
sentences.zh: 长期致力于某件事是非常困难的。

sentences.en: If what I’m doing is going to take multiple days to have a result I have less motivations to do it.
sentences.zh: 如果我正在做的事情需要几天时间才能得到结果，我就没有动力去做这件事。

sentences.en: Meanwhile, vibe coding small utility scripts is fun I keep doing it whenever I see a friction.
sentences.zh: 与此同时，vibe 编写小型实用脚本很有趣，每当我看到摩擦时，我就会继续这样做。

sentences.en: Whenever I am stuck I can throw my problem into it and wait strengthen this habit of waiting for an answer from someone as opposed to work through problems.
sentences.zh: 每当我遇到困难时，我都会把问题扔进去，然后等待，强化这种等待别人回答而不是解决问题的习惯。

sentences.en: And they are fast in getting back the results.
sentences.zh: 他们很快就能返回结果。

sentences.en: So next time I have to read a paper to understand the subject I will be more reluctant because I can get a faster result through them.
sentences.zh: 因此，下次我必须阅读论文来理解该主题时，我会更不愿意，因为通过它们我可以更快地得到结果。

blocks.html_en: I’m changing some habits to replace the current ones. If I don’t feel motivated enough to do anything I get up and pick up a book to read. I’m keeping a Garden in my balcony is that when I’m tired I can move the soil around and plant some pots and prune plants. I find this to be a less addictive than say, watching a movie. When the motivation comes back I can stop it easily.

sentences.en: I’m changing some habits to replace the current ones.
sentences.zh: 我正在改变一些习惯来取代目前的习惯。

sentences.en: If I don’t feel motivated enough to do anything I get up and pick up a book to read.
sentences.zh: 如果我感觉没有足够的动力去做任何事情，我就会起身拿起一本书来读。

sentences.en: I’m keeping a Garden in my balcony is that when I’m tired I can move the soil around and plant some pots and prune plants.
sentences.zh: 我在阳台上建了一个花园，当我累了的时候，我可以移动周围的土壤，种植一些花盆和修剪植物。

sentences.en: I find this to be a less addictive than say, watching a movie.
sentences.zh: 我发现这比看电影更不容易上瘾。

sentences.en: When the motivation comes back I can stop it easily.
sentences.zh: 当动力回来时，我可以很容易地停止它。

blocks.html_en: My goal was not to find an answer for this problem. I wanted to see what’s going on and why I am not doing anything inconsequential in the past few months. Anyway the timer I set to write this really helped. I spent a lot more time to write this but it gave me the initial motivation to write.

sentences.en: My goal was not to find an answer for this problem.
sentences.zh: 我的目标不是找到这个问题的答案。

sentences.en: I wanted to see what’s going on and why I am not doing anything inconsequential in the past few months.
sentences.zh: 我想看看发生了什么事，以及为什么我在过去的几个月里没有做任何无关紧要的事情。

sentences.en: Anyway the timer I set to write this really helped.
sentences.zh: 无论如何，我设置的写这篇文章的计时器确实很有帮助。

sentences.en: I spent a lot more time to write this but it gave me the initial motivation to write.
sentences.zh: 我花了很多时间来写这篇文章，但这给了我最初的写作动力。

content_html_zh:
我现在就有这种感觉。 我必须在电脑上设置一个 15 分钟的计时器，并排除所有干扰才能写这篇文章。 如果我不强迫自己集中注意力，几分钟后我很容易就会被某些事情分散注意力。 即使当我正在做我一直在等待做的事情时，我仍然感到想做其他事情的冲动。

我不知道这件事是如何以及何时发生的。 在过去的几年里，我一直在学习、工作和做开源。 并且确实把事情做好了。 同时做所有这些需要关注我想做的事情并忽略噪音。

如今，如果我能有 1 小时的专注时间，我就很幸运了。 需要明确的是，我的目标不是每周工作 90 小时或任何疯狂的事情。 这对我来说是不可能的。 我只希望我花在编程、学习或写作上的时间只是一项活动。 但相反，我花了 10 分钟做某件事，然后我就分心了，然后尝试再次集中注意力。

理想情况下，我希望能够计划长时间专注于某件事而不受任何干扰。 之后返回在线检查消息和其他内容。

干扰并不是一件特别的事情。 举几个例子：

  • 我想做点什么，我记得有一篇与此相关的帖子。 我去找它，在中间我点击了一些链接，最终读到了一些完全不相关的东西。
  • 我在等待某件事，然后我去浏览网页，然后我就分心了。
  • 我正在做某件事，但面临一个挑战，我必须思考 10 分钟。 我起身去拿水，一路上查看手机，心烦意乱。 有时我会因整理床铺而分心。

感觉就像我的大脑找到了一种方法来做其他事情，避免无聊或辛苦工作等痛苦的情况。

这让我想起高中时和朋友谈论躺在床上玩手机如何在不知不觉中消磨几个小时。 那是在 2015 年左右，当时那些需要注意力的应用程序虽然功能不那么强大，但仍然能吸引青少年的注意力几个小时。 我了解到这些应用程序应该非常小心地使用。 那时我决定床边不再放充电器。 那时主要是关于我的手机，因为当我在电脑上时，我要么在看书，要么在编程，要么在玩游戏。 即使我没有心情思考，我也会玩策略游戏或国际象棋。 这些活动锻炼了头脑，而且很有趣。 所有这些都是有意的活动。 我没有进行任何被动活动，例如在计算机上浏览或聊天。

后来我发现了HackerNoon和Medium，这是我在电脑后面无聊时第一个浏览的网站。 这意味着我有办法轻松摆脱无聊。 它曾经有一些高质量的内容。 它激励我去做一些项目并学习更多编程。 我在那里找到了像 CSDojo 这样的频道。 现在我什至不打开它们。 它们充满了垃圾或点击诱饵文章，可能是因为货币化激励。 然后，黑客新闻、YouTube 等取代了他们的位置。 一路上我还找到了一些好人和博客。 我学会了在公交车上保留一份我喜欢阅读的人的阅读清单。

当我无聊的时候，我慢慢地找到了更多的活动。 这让我更难专注于困难的事情。 让我坚持下去的是没有出路。 我必须解决一些代数问题。 我对自己所做的事情保持着很高的理解度。 我所有的事情都是用 LaTeX 完成的，所以我不能从别人那里复制。 我是唯一一个打字的人。

我第一次看到人们不付出努力却仍然得到回报是在工作中。 你可能会想，大学里的人不就是不断作弊、抄作业，取得好成绩吗？ 是的，但是当你与该小组中的某个人交谈时，很明显他对这个话题一无所知。 那时，好成绩对我来说并没有多大意义。 作为一名学生，作弊并不能让你走得那么远。

在工作中则不同。 我的大部分时间都是在开会和聊天。 实际工作和废话之间的平衡是倾斜的。 我看到那些几乎不做任何工作、只是说说而已的人都取得了成功。 只要人们将 10% 的注意力投入到工作中，他们在大多数环境中就被认为是很好的。 之前我做了一个实验来记录我的时间，发现我一周在 Slack 上聊天的时间有 8 个小时。

我不在乎雇主想如何分散员工的注意力。 但这让我习惯了编程时的干扰。 我正在努力消除这种损害。

下一个重大变化是更多地使用法学硕士。 我发现自己多次遇到这种情况，我将一些东西外包给法学硕士，然后我开始做其他事情。 在这样做的同时，我一直在思考它在做什么。 或者当我在思考某件事时，我开始与法学硕士谈论我的想法，而不是开始做某事，我只处于研究模式几个小时。

很高兴我能够请其他人为我研究某个主题。 但只有当我能够不去想它而继续做其他事情时，生产力才会到来。 我没有打开任何通知，所以它不会分散我的注意力。 但我仍然发现自己在思考我刚刚要求它做什么，而我无法专注于其他事情。

同时，如果我花时间与法学硕士互动，我会感觉很慢。 我必须等待回复，并且必须纠正每一个回复。 人工智能的最佳用途似乎是外包他们可以端到端且无错误地完成的工作。

为什么我一直这样做？ 大概是因为它简单、快速、高效。 如果我意识到我必须做某事，我可以把它写下来以便稍后再做，或者我可以要求法学硕士去做。 只有当我开始同时做这么多事情时，问题才会出现，因为它实际上是在做这件事。 然后我脑子里有很多事情，无法真正集中注意力。 我必须时不时地检查它并引导它朝正确的方向前进。

这太刺激了，在某种程度上，没有法学硕士做一些事情有时会很无聊。 您不会那么快看到结果。 这使得对焦变得更加困难。

那么我怎样才能恢复集中注意力的能力呢？ 有时我会直播我正在做的事情，因为有了相机，我无法通过抓起手机来逃避艰巨的挑战。 我过去常常与朋友合作，因为不和。 不幸的是，这已经不可能了，因为现在伊朗人无法拥有稳定的互联网连接。

长期致力于某件事是非常困难的。 如果我正在做的事情需要几天时间才能得到结果，我就没有动力去做这件事。 与此同时，vibe 编写小型实用脚本很有趣，每当我看到摩擦时，我就会继续这样做。 每当我遇到困难时，我都会把问题扔进去，然后等待，强化这种等待别人回答而不是解决问题的习惯。 他们很快就能返回结果。 因此，下次我必须阅读论文来理解该主题时，我会更不愿意，因为通过它们我可以更快地得到结果。

我正在改变一些习惯来取代目前的习惯。 如果我感觉没有足够的动力去做任何事情，我就会起身拿起一本书来读。 我在阳台上建了一个花园，当我累了的时候，我可以移动周围的土壤，种植一些花盆和修剪植物。 我发现这比看电影更不容易上瘾。 当动力回来时，我可以很容易地停止它。

我的目标不是找到这个问题的答案。 我想看看发生了什么事，以及为什么我在过去的几个月里没有做任何无关紧要的事情。 无论如何，我设置的写这篇文章的计时器确实很有帮助。 我花了很多时间来写这篇文章，但这给了我最初的写作动力。
